about.title: About ClickIn 360
about.subtitle: We build systems—not hype chatbots.
paragraphs: We're a startup focused on B2C stores in Mexico, LATAM, and the US that want real friction reduction—with connected data and workflows your team controls.
We don't promise magic or replacing your people: we automate repeat work and keep approvals, exceptions, and financial decisions human.
Every project starts with a discovery call to align scope, integrations, and channels.

values.title: Connected data
values.desc: Answers grounded in your catalog, orders, and policies.

values.title: Human judgment
values.desc: Refunds and exceptions with clear rules.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers about how we work.

items.q: Is this just a chatbot?
items.a: No. ClickIn 360 builds systems connected to real store data and workflows (products, orders, shipping, policies, FAQs, carts)—not generic text-only bots.

items.q: How does the system work?
items.a: It connects your channels (WhatsApp, Instagram, etc.) to business data, understands each request, pulls relevant information, and responds automatically. Human judgment cases route to your team.

items.q: How long does implementation take?
items.a: It depends on scope and integration complexity—defined on your discovery call with our technical team.

items.q: Do I need to change my eCommerce platform?
items.a: No. We integrate with your existing platform when reliable API access is available.

items.q: Can it run on multiple channels at once?
items.a: Yes—WhatsApp, Instagram DM, Messenger, and web chat can run together in one implementation.

items.q: Does it work with WhatsApp?
items.a: Yes—especially for post-purchase and off-site conversations. Pre-purchase on-site uses web chat, product/cart assistants, or embed widgets. Instagram DM and Messenger are evaluated per case.

items.q: Do I need WhatsApp Business?
items.a: It's preferred. We can review setup on your discovery call. Advanced integrations use WhatsApp Business API (Meta), which requires Meta approval.

items.q: Can the system send outbound messages?
items.a: Yes, within WhatsApp Business API policies—order/shipping updates, cart reminders, and post-sale follow-ups using approved templates.

items.q: Can it automate returns?
items.a: Yes—eligibility checks, order data collection, return instructions, and refund status updates. Final refund approval always stays with your team.

items.q: Can it handle angry customers?
items.a: It can detect tone and route delicate cases to humans—it won't try to resolve complex complaints autonomously.

items.q: Can it answer product-specific questions?
items.a: Yes, when your platform provides reliable product data. Answer depth depends on what's available.

items.q: Can it follow up on abandoned carts?
items.a: Yes—when your platform supports it, with automated follow-ups via WhatsApp or other channels.

items.q: Can it integrate with my CRM?
items.a: Depends on the CRM. We work with tools like GoHighLevel and HubSpot; others are evaluated case by case.

items.q: Can AI approve refunds, discounts, or cancellations?
items.a: Not by default—these require clear rules and approval paths. AI facilitates; humans authorize financial actions.

items.q: Does AI replace my team?
items.a: No—it reduces manual work on common interactions. Your team keeps approvals, exceptions, complaints, refunds, discounts, and sensitive cases.

items.q: What happens when AI can't resolve a case?
items.a: It routes to your team with full conversation context—customers don't have to repeat everything.

items.q: Do I need a technical team to maintain it?
items.a: Not necessarily—we handle implementation and configuration. Ongoing maintenance depends on scope in your proposal.

items.q: Do you guarantee more sales?
items.a: No—we reduce friction; results depend on traffic, product, offer, pricing, demand, and execution.

items.q: Can it work with a custom platform?
items.a: Possibly, with reliable API access—requires technical review before confirming scope.

items.q: Do you offer voice agents?
items.a: Yes, as an add-on for stores with a support phone line and frequent call volume.

items.q: What store data do you need?
items.a: Typically products, orders, inventory, shipping, tracking, policies, FAQs, and customer data when available—defined on the technical call.

items.q: Is it safe to give you store data access?
items.a: We use read-only access where possible and minimum permissions per integration. Security details are reviewed on your discovery call.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — ClickIn 360
privacy.description: How ClickIn 360 LLC collects, uses, and protects personal information on our website and services.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: ClickIn 360 LLC ("ClickIn 360," "we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect personal information when you visit our website, use our chat and booking tools, or engage our CRM and automation services.
privacyPage.contactNote: For privacy requests or questions, contact us at

sections.title: 1. Scope
paragraphs: This policy applies to personal information processed through clickin360.com and related marketing pages, web chat, lead forms, booking flows, and the ClickIn 360 CRM platform when provided to customers and their authorized users.

If you use our services on behalf of a business customer, that customer may also have its own privacy practices for data they control in the CRM. This policy describes our practices as a service provider and website operator.

sections.title: 2. Information we collect
paragraphs: We may collect the following categories of information:
list: Identity and contact data (name, email, phone, company)
Account and authentication data for CRM users
Communications (chat transcripts, form submissions, support messages)
Booking and calendar data you provide when scheduling a call
Technical data (IP address, browser type, device identifiers, pages viewed)

sections.title: 3. How we collect information
paragraphs: We collect information directly from you when you submit forms, chat with our assistant, book a meeting, register for the CRM, or contact us.
We also collect information automatically through logs and analytics when you use our website, and from integrations you or your organization authorize (for example, email or calendar connections).

sections.title: 4. How we use information
paragraphs: We use personal information to:
list: Provide, operate, and improve our website and services
Respond to inquiries, qualify leads, and schedule discovery calls
Deliver CRM, automation, and integration features for customers
Send service-related notices and, where permitted, marketing communications
Monitor security, prevent fraud, and enforce our terms
Comply with legal obligations and resolve disputes

sections.title: 5. Legal bases (where applicable)
paragraphs: If you are in the European Economic Area, United Kingdom, or similar jurisdictions, we process personal data based on: (a) performance of a contract or steps prior to entering a contract; (b) legitimate interests (such as improving services and securing our platform), balanced against your rights; (c) consent where required (for example, certain cookies or marketing); and (d) compliance with legal obligations.

sections.title: 6. How we share information
paragraphs: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with service providers that help us host infrastructure, send email, provide analytics, or support AI and automation features, under contracts that require appropriate safeguards.
We may disclose information if required by law, to protect rights and safety, or in connection with a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, with notice where legally required.

sections.title: 7. International transfers
paragraphs: We may process and store information in the United States and other countries where we or our providers operate. When we transfer personal data internationally, we use appropriate safeguards such as standard contractual clauses or equivalent mechanisms where required by law.

sections.title: 8. Data retention
paragraphs: We retain personal information only as long as needed for the purposes described in this policy, to meet legal and accounting requirements, and to resolve disputes. Retention periods vary by data type and customer agreements.

sections.title: 9. Cookies and analytics
paragraphs: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember preferences (such as language), keep sessions secure, and understand how visitors use our site. You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling some cookies may affect site functionality.

sections.title: 10. Security
paragraphs: We implement administrative, technical, and organizational measures designed to protect personal information. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure; we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.title: 11. Your rights and choices
paragraphs: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or port your personal data, and to object to certain processing. You may also withdraw consent where processing is consent-based.
To exercise rights, email us at the address below. We may need to verify your identity. You may also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

sections.title: 12. Children's privacy
paragraphs: Our services are not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected such information, contact us and we will delete it.

sections.title: 13. Third-party links
paragraphs: Our website may link to third-party sites or services. Their privacy practices are governed by their own policies, not this one.

sections.title: 14. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will post the revised version on this page and update the "Last updated" date. Material changes may be communicated through the website or by email where appropriate.

servicesPage.title: Build, integrate, and automate what your business runs on
